SOURCE: 59962788.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (59962788.pdf)
SUMMARY: Forward-thinking HR Generalist highly effective at adapting to evolving market plans and the needs associated with company expansion.
SKILLS: New employee orientations, Compensation and benefits, Termination procedures, In-depth knowledge of HR Compliance, Project management, MS Office proficient, Knowledgeable in all HR Systems, Team building, Employee recruitment, Interpersonal Skills, Good Communication Skill, Fast learner, Flexibility

SOURCE: 59962788.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Executive
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 11/2012 - 09/2014
DESCRIPTION: Developed company personnel policies, standard operating procedures and employee handbooks. Developed and facilitated new-hire orientations. Conducted employment verifications and investigations. Built a comprehensive employee recruiting strategy. Developed and enforced company policy and procedures relating to all phases of human resources activity. Managed leave administration, including vendor management, disability programs, and health benefits. Established and monitored employee pay scales. Conducted job analysis and evaluations. Developed innovative new-employee orientation programs. Updated HR metrics using reporting tools on the HRMS database.

SOURCE: 59962788.pdf
JOB TITLE: Dr.Kamakshi Memorial Hospital Pvt Ltd
COMPANY: 
DATES: Nov'12 - Sep'14
DESCRIPTION: Worked in the core quality team to obtain NABH certification. Revamped organizational structure and redesigned onboarding processes. Facilitated feasibility study of an integrated payroll package for hospital employees. Acting as a Training Coordinator cum Trainer. Maintained leave records database, employee credentials, personal records, training tracker, and calendar. Prepared SOPs, HR manuals, join score cards, salary increments, and salary statements. Arranged and conducted interviews, initial screening of candidates. Preparing and issuing HR offer letters, appointment letters. Conducted induction programs for new onboarding employees. Properly upgraded employee training programs and evaluated their effectiveness. Prepared KPI/KRA's for all designations. Attended to employee grievances and complaints.
